summary: Thermal printer output fix VERIFIED. Bug was: physical output showed 'Item 1, Item 2...' instead of actual book codes (MAT-3A, ESP-3B) and book names. Fix: handleThermalPrint now uses fetch+document.write pattern. Backend returns correct HTML with book codes and names.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/print/thermal-page returns HTML with book codes (MAT-3A, ESP-3B, SCI-3C, HIS-5A, ENG-5B)
Backend: GET /api/print/thermal-page returns HTML with book names (Matematicas, Espanol, Ciencias, Historia)
Backend: GET /api/print/thermal-page does NOT contain generic 'Item 1, Item 2' placeholders
Backend: POST /api/print/jobs returns order data with book_code field
Backend: POST /api/print/jobs returns order data with book_name field
Backend: POST /api/print/jobs returns format_config with show_item_code=true
Backend: Item fields are normalized for frontend compatibility (name, title, quantity)
Frontend: Order Details dialog shows Code column (MAT-3A, ESP-3B, SCI-3C)
Frontend: Order Details dialog shows Book column (Matematicas 3er Grado, etc.)
Frontend: Order Details dialog shows Price column ($15.50, $12.75, $18.00)
Frontend: Order Details dialog shows Qty column (x1, x2)
Frontend: Order Details dialog has Print button that opens PrintDialog
Frontend: PrintDialog shows Print Preview with correct book codes and names
Frontend: PrintDialog shows 'Print to LR2000E' button
Frontend: Bulk selection shows BulkActionBar with 'Package List' button
Frontend: Bulk print preview shows multiple orders (2 orders) with navigation arrows
Frontend: Bulk print shows correct book codes for all selected orders

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Thermal printer output shows 'Item 1, Item 2...' instead of actual book codes and names
bugs_verified_fixed.evidence: PrintDialog now correctly shows book codes (MAT-3A, ESP-3B, SCI-3C) and book names (Matematicas 3er Grado, etc.) in the preview. Backend thermal-page endpoint returns correct HTML.
bugs_verified_fixed.fix_applied: Changed handleThermalPrint from window.open(url) to fetch(url) + document.write(html) pattern - same pattern used for Standard Print

bugs_verified_fixed.evidence: PackageListPreview component correctly renders book_code and book_name from order items. Standard Print button works and shows correct data.

seed_data_creation: Test orders (ord_test001, ord_test002) with proper book_code and book_name fields were pre-created in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Thermal printer bug is FIXED. Key fix was in PrintDialog.jsx handleThermalPrint function - changed from window.open(url) to fetch(url) + document.write(html) pattern. Test orders: ord_test001 (Maria Rodriguez, 3 items: MAT-3A, ESP-3B, SCI-3C), ord_test002 (Juan Perez, 2 items: HIS-5A, ENG-5B). PrintDialog component at /app/frontend/src/modules/print/PrintDialog.jsx, PackageListPreview at /app/frontend/src/modules/print/PackageListPreview.jsx, Backend print module at /app/backend/modules/print/__init__.py
